name: Spin the Wheel
description: Create a custom spinning wheel for random decisions. Add names, options, or prizes and let fate decide.

name: Fancy Text Generator
description: Transform plain text into stylish Unicode fonts. Copy and paste anywhere — Instagram, Twitter, TikTok bios.

name: Typing Speed Test
description: Test your typing speed with our interactive keyboard. Get WPM, accuracy, and rank against others.

name: Color Blind Challenge
description: Can you spot the different color? Challenge your color perception with increasing difficulty levels.

name: Emoji Mixer
description: Combine two emojis to create something new. A fun alternative to Google Emoji Kitchen with unique combinations.

name: Random Picker
description: Enter a list of items and let the random picker choose one. Perfect for giveaways, teams, and tough decisions.

name: Truth or Dare
description: The classic party game with hundreds of questions. Three difficulty levels: mild, medium, and spicy.

name: Would You Rather
description: Tough choices, endless debates. Vote on dilemmas and see what others chose. Great conversation starter.

name: Coin Flip & Dice Roll
description: Flip a coin or roll dice with realistic 3D physics animations. Perfect for settling bets and board games.

name: Color Palette Generator
description: Extract beautiful color palettes from any image. Get complementary colors, hex codes, and CSS gradients.

name: ASCII Art Generator
description: Convert any image into stunning ASCII art. Adjust density, contrast, and character set for unique results.

name: Meme Maker
description: Create and customize memes with popular templates. Add text, change fonts, and share directly to social media.

name: Retro Text Generator
description: Create vaporwave, typewriter, and neon-style text effects. Unicode decorative characters with CSS filters.

name: Reaction Time Test
description: How fast are your reflexes? Click when the color changes and compare your score on the global leaderboard.

name: Memory Challenge
description: Remember increasingly longer sequences of numbers. Train your short-term memory with this addictive brain game.

name: Fun IQ Quiz
description: A light-hearted intelligence quiz with pattern recognition and logic puzzles. Get your fun IQ score instantly.

name: 2048 Game
description: The addictive puzzle game. Combine tiles to reach 2048. Play with keyboard or touch. Saves your best score.

name: BMI Calculator
description: Calculate your Body Mass Index instantly. Switch between metric and imperial units with a visual health scale.

name: Tip Calculator
description: Calculate tips and split restaurant bills. Preset percentages for different countries and round-up options.

name: Date Difference Calculator
description: Find the exact time between two dates. Get results in years, months, days, hours, and natural language.

name: Period Tracker
description: Track and predict menstrual cycles. Private, local-only storage with calendar view and reminder predictions.

name: Water Intake Calculator
description: Calculate your daily water needs based on weight and activity level. Track your hydration with visual progress.

name: Upside Down Text
description: Flip your text upside down with Unicode characters. Copy and paste to prank friends or make your bio unique.

name: Password Strength Checker
description: Check how strong your password is. Get crack time estimates, improvement tips, and visual strength indicator.

name: Fake Data Generator
description: Generate realistic fake data for testing. Names, addresses, phone numbers, and more. Export as JSON or CSV.

name: Morse Code Translator
description: Translate text to Morse code and back. Listen to the telegraph sounds with Web Audio API for full immersion.

name: Dad Joke Generator
description: Get an endless supply of dad jokes. One-click copy, share to social, and discover new groan-worthy puns.

name: Fake Chat Generator
description: Create realistic fake messaging screenshots. Customize avatars, names, messages, and export as images.

name: Fake Receipt Generator
description: Generate custom fake receipts for pranks. Customize store name, items, prices, and download as image.

name: Fortune Cookie
description: Crack open a virtual fortune cookie. Beautiful Chinese poetry-inspired fortunes with shareable cards.

name: Emoji Riddles
description: Guess the phrase from emoji clues! Timed rounds, hints, and increasing difficulty keep you coming back.

name: SQL Formatter & EXPLAIN
description: Format SQL queries instantly with syntax highlighting. Supports MySQL, PostgreSQL, and SQLite dialects.

name: Mermaid Diagram Editor
description: Live-preview Mermaid.js diagrams directly in the browser. Flowcharts, sequence diagrams, and more.

name: Cron Expression Visualizer
description: Parse cron expressions and see when they will run next. Human-readable description for each field.

name: JWT Decoder
description: Decode and inspect JWT tokens. View header, payload, and signature with claims explanation.

name: HTTP Headers Analyzer
description: Parse and explain HTTP request headers. See what your browser sends to every website.

name: Regex Visualizer
description: Test regular expressions with real-time visual feedback. Supports Unicode and Chinese characters.

name: Browser Fingerprint
description: See your unique browser fingerprint. Check canvas, WebGL, fonts, plugins, and more.

name: IP / CIDR Calculator
description: Calculate subnet masks, network addresses, and IP ranges from CIDR notation.

name: AI Tool Comparator
description: Compare the best AI tools side by side. Find the right AI writing, image, coding, or video tool with pricing and features.

name: Affiliate Commission Calculator
description: Calculate your potential earnings from affiliate programs. Compare one-time, recurring, and revenue-share commission models.
